zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Clopton I於大約1150年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可時，他的父親William de Clopton I32歲，母親Anne de Grey44歲。他於大約1169年與Chewyt在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1221年在他的家鄉享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Clopton I was born about 1150, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Clopton I, was 32 and his mother, Anne de Grey, was 44. He married Chewyt about 1169, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1221, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Clopton I est né environ 1150, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Clopton I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne de Grey, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Chewyt environ 1169, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1221, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Clopton I um 1150 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Clopton I 32 und seine Mutter Anne de Grey 44. Er hat um 1169 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Chewyt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1221 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Chewyt circa 1169, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1221, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Clopton Iが約1150年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで生まれた時，父William de Clopton Iは32歳，母Anne de Greyは44歳であった。約1169年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでChewytと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1221年に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Clopton I(이)가 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Clopton I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de Grey(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1169년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Chewyt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1221년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Clopton I nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Clopton I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Grey, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Chewyt aproximadamente 1169, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1221, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Clopton I родился около 1150 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Clopton I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne de Grey, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Chewyt около 1169 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1221 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

Se casó con Chewyt aproximadamente 1169, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1221, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
